session_focus: Harden loop verification so task endpoints must return canonical payloads, not just exist.
user_directives: Harden loop verification so task endpoints must return canonical payloads, not just exist.
assistant_responses: Added endpoint-shape checks for dashboard tasks like traces, model status, dataset, training, audit, freeze, stray, and steering. Variant 29 preserves the conversation milestone as reusable training data rather than transient chat.
training_value: Route existence is weaker than route usefulness; payload shape is part of runtime truth.

A future regression could keep the route alive while returning an empty or broken shape. Variant 29 reframes the same milestone through the lens of runtime verification, UI trust, and repo-backed data visibility.
